title: Orecraft Adventures
description: Orecraft Adventures is a Minecraft forge mod that adds brand new ores and features!
body:
Orecraft Adventures is an exciting and expansive Minecraft mod that enriches the game with new adventures, challenges, and exploration opportunities. It reimagines ore generation, adds unique biomes, new crafting recipes, and introduces mysterious structures scattered across the world. This mod aims to offer players a new sense of discovery and adventure as they delve into unknown lands and uncover valuable resources, rare items, and dangerous foes.

Anyone and Everyone is allowed to use this project in their Modrinth Modpacks.
